headline: Global Healthcare Infrastructure Strengthens IQV Amid Weak Liquidity
summary: IQVIA Holdings gains from its vast healthcare data, AI-driven analytics & global IT infrastructure, supporting expansion and solid growth.

raw.headline: Global Healthcare Infrastructure Strengthens IQV Amid Weak Liquidity
raw.summary: IQVIA Holdings gains from its vast healthcare data, AI-driven analytics & global IT infrastructure, supporting expansion and solid growth.

headline: Wiley and IQVIA Release Cross-Sector Report on AI’s Promise and Pressure Points Across Healthcare Value Chain
summary: HOBOKEN, N.J., June 15, 2026--Wiley (NYSE: WLY) and IQVIA (NYSE: IQV) today released Scientific Discovery & AI: The Science-to-Patient Journey, a cross-sector intelligence report drawing on candid dialogue among more than 25 senior leaders from pharma R&D, academic medicine, health systems, AI and technology, publishing and learned societies.
